name: Hezbollah
summary: Day 87 of Hormuz blockade (Monday May 25). **LEBANON FRONT HOT — THE 'CALIBRATED ATTRITION / NON-RETALIATION HOLDS' FRAMING IS RETIRED. Hezbollah — never a formal ceasefire signatory — has reportedly fired OVER 1,000 DRONES AND OVER 700 ROCKETS at Israel over the past EIGHT DAYS in an apparent bid to derail the Israel-Lebanon talks; this is a large-scale campaign, not the prior drone-and-mortar attrition ceiling (campaign CONFIRMED — IDF Northern Command chief Maj. Gen. Rafi Milo on record that the command is 'at war' and 'will not tolerate fire on the home front'; exact tally REPORTED — single US-official channel relayed by Times of Israel May 25).** A senior US official told Channel 12 + Axios that Washington could GREENLIGHT A LARGER ISRAELI OPERATION against Hezbollah, citing Hezbollah ignoring 'a recent ultimatum'; the IDF has drawn up expanded Lebanon plans (REPORTED). **Hezbollah's structural status is now the binding constraint on the US-Iran deal**: Iran treats 'end the war on all fronts including Lebanon' as a precondition (Baghaei restated Monday; an Iranian adviser: 'Without fully restraining America’s rabid dog in Lebanon, there will be no ceasefire'), while the US is simultaneously preparing to authorise an EXPANSION of the Lebanon campaign — the two tracks have no synchronisation mechanism, and Hezbollah is a signatory to nothing. New trigger added at `watching`: US greenlights OR Israel launches an expanded operation against Hezbollah within 14 days (by 2026-06-08). No expanded ground operation launched yet (REPORTED/PREPARATION). PRIOR (May 24): **ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE DAY 10 OF 45-DAY EXTENSION — HEZBOLLAH CONTINUES TO OPERATE WITHIN CALIBRATED DRONE-AND-MORTAR ATTRITION CEILING; NO SECOND IDF KIA INSIDE LITANI-AREA SCOPE SINCE MAY 14 NEGEV DAGAN. PENTAGON-LED SECURITY TRACK MAY 29 LAUNCH ON CALENDAR. AXIOS 60-DAY MOU TEXT INTEGRATES ISRAEL-HEZBOLLAH CEASEFIRE — 'NOT ONE-SIDED, ISRAEL MAY RESPOND IF HEZBOLLAH REARMS' — HEZBOLLAH STRUCTURAL STATUS NOW DIRECTLY EMBEDDED IN US-IRAN DEAL ARCHITECTURE. THE COORDINATED QUIETISM ACROSS IRAN'S PROXY NETWORK (HEZBOLLAH CALIBRATED + HOUTHI HAIFA RHETORIC-WITHOUT-ACTION + IRGC GLOBAL-OFFENSIVE NOT FOLLOWED UP) WHILE THE DEAL TRACK MOVES IS THE STRUCTURAL INTELLIGENCE.** PRIOR (May 22): ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE DAY 8 OF 45-DAY EXTENSION — HEZBOLLAH NON-RETALIATION HOLDS. IDF AIRSTRIKES NABATIEH (MAY 22) + AL-HANIYYA (MAY 21). NO SECOND IDF KIA SINCE MAY 14 DAGAN. HEZBOLLAH HAS NOT PUBLICLY CLAIMED RETALIATORY MORTAR/ROCKET FIRE MAY 19-22 — SILENCE IS ITSELF THE NEGATIVE-SPACE VERIFICATION.** Hezbollah's response remains within the calibrated drone-and-mortar attrition ceiling that has held since the April 16 ceasefire, NOT full-spectrum kinetic re-engagement. **Structurally consistent with multi-track Iranian diplomatic posture** (Araghchi procedurally engaged with Pakistan track; IRGC May 21 'global offensive' threat = RHETORIC NO ACTION; Hezbollah calibrated silence). **The 'second IDF KIA in southern Lebanon during 45-day ceasefire extension' trigger remains UNTRIPPED Day 8 of 45.** Pentagon-led security architecture starting May 29 operationally intact — Hezbollah's structural status under direct US military oversight pressure. **The Iran proxy network's graduated restraint inside the Gulf-mediated deal window**: Houthi Haifa rhetoric without operational follow-through (Day 4 of 14); Hezbollah calibrated silence; IRGC rhetoric without action. The kinetic floor holds even as rhetorical channels open. PRIOR (May 19 — Monday): **A8 ISRAEL-LEBANON DAY 4 OF 45-DAY CEASEFIRE EXTENSION; KINETIC EXCHANGE CONTINUES WITHIN FLOOR/CEILING.** Lebanese health ministry: 18 killed + 124 wounded past day of IDF strikes (Haaretz live blog May 17, ms.now); cumulative ~2,987 dead / ~9,236 wounded since March 2 if applied additively. **IDF reported NO new injuries through Monday morning IST; no second IDF KIA confirmed.** Litani-induced-Israeli-KIA trigger from Day 2 of 14 (Dagan May 14) remains active_fired; May 16 'second IDF KIA in southern Lebanon during 45-day ceasefire extension window' trigger remains UNTRIPPED. Both sides continue to operate within unwritten kinetic floor (strikes) and ceiling (no escalation to mass-casualty IDF events). **Pentagon security track scheduled May 29 launch remains on calendar.** Hezbollah's response remains within calibrated drone-and-mortar attrition pattern, NOT full-spectrum kinetic re-engagement — structurally consistent with multi-track Iranian diplomatic posture (Araghchi defer-enrichment, Shamkhani conditional-acceptance, Naqvi-mediation Day 2 of 14). Houthi Red Sea Day 7 of 7 negative-space window closes UNTRIPPED today — **coordinated quietism across Iran's proxy network (Hezbollah calibrated, Houthi non-action) while Western kinetic-preparation rhetoric escalates (Trump-Netanyahu call, 'clock is ticking', NSC Tuesday).** **PRIOR (May 17): Day 79 of Hormuz blockade (Sunday) — Hezbollah-IDF kinetic continues within unwritten ceiling. **ON SUNDAY MORNING MAY 17, HEZBOLLAH FIRED SEVERAL ROCKETS AND EXPLOSIVE DRONES AT IDF TROOPS IN SOUTHERN LEBANON** (CONFIRMED ACTION — IDF statement, Times of Israel May 17 liveblog primary). Rockets and several drones shot down; some drones exploded near Israeli forces; **NO INJURIES — IDF explicitly stated.** One drone triggered sirens in border community Misgav Am. **This is the operational fact that matters most for the trigger map**: Hezbollah striking IDF without killing IDF; IDF (Saturday May 16) striking Hezbollah infrastructure across Tayr Falsayh, Yanouh, Shahabiya, Qaqaiyat al-Sanoubar, Tuffahta, Ghassaniya, Kawthariyat al-Sayyad without conducting Beirut-suburb operations. Both sides operating within an unwritten kinetic floor and ceiling under the formal ceasefire. **The Litani-induced-Israeli-KIA trigger that fired Day 2 of 14 (Dagan May 14) now at Day 4 of 14 inside the 45-day extension window; 'second IDF KIA during 45-day extension' trigger added May 16 remains UNTRIPPED.** Hezbollah's response within the calibrated drone-and-mortar attrition pattern, NOT full-spectrum kinetic re-engagement — structurally consistent with the multi-track Iranian diplomatic posture (Araghchi defer-enrichment, Shamkhani conditional-acceptance, now Naqvi-mediation), not a maximalist response. **The architecture-collapse scenario has been further deferred — 48 hours of no second IDF KIA despite continued kinetic exchange validates the cabinet's choice to extend.** PRIOR (May 16): ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE EXTENDED 45 DAYS to ~2026-06-29 with PENTAGON-LED SECURITY TRACK to begin May 29** (CONFIRMED — State Dept primary, Bloomberg, PBS, Times of Israel). **Hezbollah was NOT a participant in the talks** but expressed conditional acceptance via SG Naim Qassem's prior 'categorically rejects direct talks' line that does not block Karam-Dermer bilateral. **NO SECOND IDF KIA in southern Lebanon since Dagan May 14 per available reporting through May 16 morning** — the 14-day Litani-KIA window's worst-case (second KIA collapses architecture) has not materialised in first 48h. Hezbollah's 24-attacks-in-24-hours pattern (Al Jazeera May 14) has not been re-reported with a fresh KIA. **Litani-KIA window is Day 3 of 14; trigger condition 'second IDF KIA inside the 14-day window collapses the architecture' remains `active_fired` but NOT RE-FIRED.** Hezbollah's response remains within the calibrated drone-and-mortar attrition pattern, not full-spectrum kinetic re-engagement. Israeli MoD has not announced a fresh KIA. Hezbollah statements not captured via search. **The action sequence is now operationally synchronised with Iranian regional posture (Akraminia 'surprising options'); but Hezbollah's calibrated attrition is structurally consistent with the multi-track Iranian diplomatic posture (Araghchi defer-enrichment, Shamkhani conditional-acceptance), not a maximalist response.** Pentagon-led security architecture beginning May 29 means Hezbollah's structural status is now under direct US military oversight — material institutional pressure. PRIOR (May 15): **LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED ON DAY 2 OF 14: STAFF SGT. NEGEV DAGAN, 20, GOLANI BRIGADE 12TH BATTALION KILLED BY HEZBOLLAH MORTAR FIRE NEAR THE LITANI MAY 14** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel primary, JNS, i24News, Haaretz, Israeli MoD primary). IDF named the soldier; total IDF war toll now 937. **LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED ON DAY 2 OF 14: STAFF SGT. NEGEV DAGAN, 20, GOLANI BRIGADE 12TH BATTALION KILLED BY HEZBOLLAH MORTAR FIRE NEAR THE LITANI MAY 14** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel primary, JNS, i24News, Haaretz, Israeli MoD primary). IDF named the soldier; total IDF war toll now 937. **Hezbollah launched 24 attacks on IDF positions, soldiers and military vehicles in southern Lebanon over a 24-hour window per Al Jazeera; Dagan KIA is one consequence of that escalation.** Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling continues to hold; this is military-target attack with confirmed casualty effect. State Department 'productive and positive' on Washington talks Day 2, ceasefire expiry May 17 (NOT May 15 — date correction). Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem's 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks line still operative but irrelevant to Karam-Dermer Washington bilateral. **The Hezbollah action sequence is now operationally synchronised with the Iranian regional posture (Akraminia 'surprising options' rhetoric on the same day from Iranian Army spokesperson)** — but Hezbollah's response remains within the calibrated drone-and-mortar attrition pattern, not full-spectrum kinetic re-engagement. **A7 IDF ANNOUNCED MAY 13 IT CARRIED OUT A 'WEEKLONG RAID' BEYOND THE LITANI RIVER NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH, LED BY GOLANI BRIGADE'S RECONNAISSANCE UNIT — IDF itself now framing operation as sustained week-long campaign, not a one-off crossing** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 13, JNS, Haaretz). 'Some 15 Hezbollah operatives' killed past 24h; 'some 45 Hezbollah targets' total over 24h including command centres, surveillance posts, weapon depots. Hezbollah fired explosive drones at Israel May 13 — drones triggered Iron Dome interceptor over southern Lebanon that IDF later said was false alarm. Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon strikes including child, woman, Lebanese army member; 2 Israeli soldiers wounded (CNN). **NO new Israeli soldier KIA past 24h — new 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger added yesterday is at Day 2 of 14 and HAS NOT activated**. Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling continues to hold. **State Department CONFIRMED PRIMARY: third round US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington May 14-15, agenda includes 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah'** — direct institutional pressure on Hezbollah's structural status; April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires May 15 as talks finish. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem's 'categorically rejects' direct talks line still operative but irrelevant to Karam-Dermer Washington bilateral. PRIOR (May 13): IDF Chief Eyal Zamir publicly declared 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon.' Hezbollah continues precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan (Press TV / Iranian state). Explosive drones at IDF troops landed in open areas. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,704 / 8,311 wounded (different reference framework vs yesterday's 2,869). NO new Israeli soldier KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 since ceasefire despite Litani crossing; civilian-inside-Israel ceiling STILL HOLDS through May 13 (Day 1 of extended 14-day window after Glovanyov; no civilian casualty inside Israel proper). CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated; Day 2 of 7-day trigger window for Israeli corroboration. **Litani ground crossing materially raises casualty + miscalculation risk going forward — Hezbollah faces direct ground confrontation for first time since April 16 ceasefire.** ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): **HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONE STRIKE NEAR MANARA (just inside Israel) MAY 10 ~16:00 KILLED IDF RESERVIST WO (RES.) ALEXANDER GLOVANYOV, 47, 6924th Transport Battalion, of Petah Tikva (announced May 11) = 5TH IDF SOLDIER KILLED post-April 16 ceasefire, ALL FIVE LINKED TO 'CHEAP, HARD-TO-DETECT' FPV/EXPLOSIVE DRONES.** Critically, Glovanyov is a SOLDIER killed on border, NOT a CIVILIAN inside Israel proper — May 10 trigger window for Israeli civilian casualty from Hezbollah expired UNTRIPPED on May 10, HOLDS through May 11-12 with no civilian casualty. **Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling has STILL HELD across the full window despite mounting IDF soldier casualties — Hezbollah is calibrating deliberately to military targets.** IDF struck 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 (evacuation warnings Rihan/Jarjouaa/Kfar Roummane/Nmairiyeh/Arab Salim/Jmaijmeh/Mashgharah/Qellaya/Harouf; drone strike Zebdine killed 2 civilians distributing bread; airstrike on Abba killed 2/wounded 5); **FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE.** Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,869. May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3 strikes), Haris (1 strike, 7th cumulative), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded (Lebanese NNA). **NEW MAY 12: surface-to-air missile fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft over south Lebanon; IDF launched interceptor; alerts triggered along Israel's Mediterranean coast (REPORTED — CGTN single-source, needs Israeli-side corroboration).** Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11 (artillery, drones, missiles at Khiam, Deir Seryan, Tayr Harfa, Bayyada, Rashaf, Naqoura) — Hezbollah-side CLAIMED, Israeli side reported only Glovanyov KIA. **Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes aired May 11: war 'not over' until proxies neutralized — Haaretz the ONLY outlet treating Hezbollah linkage as deliberate war-extension ('Netanyahu Signals Hezbollah Fighting May Continue After Cease-fire').** Knesset extended reservist authority to May 31; IDF Chief Zamir said military needs 12,000 additional recruits — institutional read: Israeli political-military system institutionalizing war footing. The asymmetry continues: 2,869+ Lebanese killed cycle vs zero Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks.

active_triggers.condition: US greenlights OR Israel launches an expanded military operation against Hezbollah in Lebanon within 14 days (by 2026-06-08)
active_triggers.note: The binding constraint on the Iran deal. Iran treats 'end the war on all fronts including Lebanon' (protection of Hezbollah) as a precondition of any US-Iran MOU (Baghaei restated May 25). A US official (Channel 12 + Axios via TOI May 25) signalled Washington could greenlight a larger Israeli operation against Hezbollah after a reported 1,000+ drones / 700+ rockets over 8 days; IDF has drawn up expanded Lebanon plans. If the greenlight converts to a launched operation, Iran's 'all fronts' precondition is breached and the deal stalls/collapses. Status `watching` only — the expanded operation is REPORTED/PREPARATION; no confirmed expanded ground op launched yet.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11)
active_triggers.expiry_note: Window CLOSED May 11 UNTRIPPED. Capability demonstrated (5 IDF soldier KIAs incl. Glovanyov May 10), but civilian-inside-Israel ceiling held. Hezbollah calibrating deliberately to military targets only.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah produces Israeli civilian casualty within next 14 days (by 2026-05-26) — extended window post-Glovanyov
active_triggers.note_2026-05-13: Day 1 of 14. IDF Litani ground crossing May 12 raises both casualty + miscalculation risk for civilian-inside-Israel scenarios. No civilian casualty inside Israel proper through May 13.

active_triggers.condition: Litani-ground-crossing-induced Israeli soldier KIA within 14 days (by 2026-05-26) — would mark transition from drone-attrition to ground-engagement casualty regime
active_triggers.activation_note: FIRED ON DAY 2 OF 14. Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, 20, Golani Brigade 12th Battalion, killed by Hezbollah mortar fire near Litani river May 14 (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel primary, JNS, i24News, Haaretz, Israeli MoD primary). Mortar fire (not drone) — distinct from prior drone-attrition pattern; transition to ground-engagement casualty regime confirmed. Trigger window was 14 days from May 13; fired on Day 2.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah SAM-at-IAF-aircraft strike confirmed (corroborated by Israeli source) within 7 days of May 12 CGTN report
active_triggers.note: Single-source CGTN report May 12 of SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft. Needs Israeli-side corroboration. If confirmed = first SAM engagement of cycle, materially escalates ceiling.

recent_signals.headline: **LEBANON FRONT HOT — HEZBOLLAH RUNNING A LARGE-SCALE DRONE/ROCKET CAMPAIGN; THE 'CALIBRATED ATTRITION / NON-RETALIATION HOLDS' FRAMING IS RETIRED.** Per a senior US official relayed by Channel 12 + Axios (via Times of Israel May 25 liveblog), over the past EIGHT DAYS Hezbollah has fired 'over a thousand drones and over 700 rockets' at Israel — an apparent bid to derail the Israel-Lebanon talks. This far exceeds the calibrated drone-and-mortar attrition ceiling tracked through May 22; the campaign is real and ongoing (IDF Northern Command chief Maj. Gen. Rafi Milo: the command is 'at war' and 'will not tolerate fire on the home front'). The US official said Washington 'could greenlight a larger Israeli operation against Hezbollah in Lebanon,' citing Hezbollah ignoring 'a recent ultimatum'; the IDF has drawn up expanded Lebanon plans. **Hezbollah was never a formal ceasefire signatory and is a signatory to nothing in the emerging MOU.** Iran treats 'end the war on all fronts including Lebanon' — i.e., protection of Hezbollah — as constitutive of any US-Iran deal (Baghaei restated Monday; an Iranian adviser: 'Without fully restraining America’s rabid dog in Lebanon, there will be no ceasefire'). New trigger added at watching: US greenlights OR Israel launches an expanded operation against Hezbollah within 14 days (by 2026-06-08). No expanded ground operation launched yet — REPORTED/PREPARATION, not confirmed action.
sources: Times of Israel May 25 liveblog 'US likely to greenlight larger Israeli operation' (Channel 12 + Axios) — primary
Times of Israel 'IDF draws up Lebanon plans'
Washington Post May 13 'Hezbollah's unjammable drones' (independent corroboration of the campaign)
House of Saud 'Lebanon Clause' (analyst framing of the precondition)
recent_signals.verification: Hezbollah drone/rocket campaign + IDF strikes ongoing = CONFIRMED ACTION (IDF Northern Command chief Milo 'at war' on record); exact '1,000+ drones / 700+ rockets in 8 days' tally = REPORTED (single US-official channel via TOI; directionally corroborated by independent reporting of an intensifying drone campaign); US 'greenlight' signal + IDF expanded Lebanon plans = REPORTED (Channel 12 + Axios); Iran 'all fronts incl. Lebanon' precondition = CONFIRMED (Baghaei on record); Iranian-adviser quote = CLAIMED (analyst relay); expanded operation NOT yet launched = REPORTED/PREPARATION.

recent_signals.headline: **DAY 5 OF 45-DAY CEASEFIRE EXTENSION — NO SECOND IDF KIA; NO HEZBOLLAH CLAIMED RETALIATION.** The Hezbollah non-retaliation pattern is the cleanest signal that Iran's proxy network is operating in TWO modes simultaneously: aggressive RHETORIC on Houthi-Haifa axis (Saree announcement today), restrained ACTION on Hezbollah-Lebanon axis. Iran preserving multiple proxy options while declining to use any in ways that would consolidate a US/Israeli kinetic-escalation case. **The Hezbollah architecture-preservation through May 19 is operationally important for the postponement window**: a Hezbollah kinetic event during the 2-3 day Pakistan-mediation window would force a US re-engagement decision.
sources: Lebanese health ministry via Al Jazeera relay
recent_signals.verification: No claimed Hezbollah retaliation = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; calibrated drone-and-mortar attrition pattern carries forward.

recent_signals.headline: **DAY 4 OF 45-DAY EXTENSION — HEZBOLLAH CALIBRATED DRONE-AND-MORTAR ATTRITION HOLDS; NO SECOND IDF KIA.** Lebanese health ministry: 18 killed + 124 wounded past day of IDF strikes (Haaretz May 17, ms.now). IDF reported NO new injuries through Monday morning IST; no second IDF KIA confirmed. Litani-induced-Israeli-KIA trigger (Dagan May 14) remains active_fired; May 16 'second IDF KIA in southern Lebanon during 45-day extension window' trigger UNTRIPPED. Both sides continue to operate within unwritten kinetic floor (strikes) and ceiling (no mass-casualty IDF events). **Hezbollah's calibrated attrition is structurally consistent with multi-track Iranian diplomatic posture (Araghchi defer-enrichment + Shamkhani conditional-acceptance + Naqvi-mediation Day 2 of 14)** — NOT a maximalist response despite Trump-Netanyahu coordination + Trump 'clock is ticking' + Saudi/UAE drone events on the same weekend. Pair with Houthi Red Sea Day 7 untripped + Mojtaba Day 11 silence + TASS/Xinhua non-amplification = **coordinated quietism across Iran's proxy/patron network during Western kinetic-preparation cycle**. Pentagon security track scheduled May 29 launch — direct US military oversight institutional pressure on Hezbollah structural status carries forward.
sources: Haaretz live blog May 16-17 (Lebanese casualty figures)
recent_signals.verification: Lebanese casualty figures = CONFIRMED (Haaretz + ms.now); No second IDF KIA = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; Hezbollah calibrated attrition pattern = CONFIRMED structural observation; coordinated-quietism across Iran network = CONFIRMED multi-source analytical observation.

recent_signals.headline: **HEZBOLLAH FIRED SEVERAL ROCKETS AND EXPLOSIVE DRONES AT IDF TROOPS IN SOUTHERN LEBANON SUNDAY MAY 17 — NO INJURIES; CALIBRATED ATTRITION WITHIN UNWRITTEN CEILING UNDER 45-DAY EXTENSION.** Day 3 of 45-day ceasefire extension. **Hezbollah fired several rockets and explosive drones at IDF troops in southern Lebanon** (CONFIRMED ACTION — IDF statement, Times of Israel May 17 liveblog primary). Rockets and several drones shot down; some drones exploded near Israeli forces; **NO INJURIES — IDF explicitly stated.** One drone triggered sirens in Misgav Am. **The operational fact that matters most for the trigger map**: Hezbollah is striking IDF without killing IDF — the calibrated drone-and-mortar attrition pattern continues, structurally consistent with multi-track Iranian diplomatic posture, not full-spectrum kinetic re-engagement. **Litani-induced-Israeli-KIA trigger now Day 4 of 14 inside the 45-day extension window; 'second IDF KIA during 45-day extension' trigger added May 16 remains UNTRIPPED.** Hezbollah was NOT a participant in Washington talks but its operational behavior is consistent with the broader Iranian six-pillar architecture (Araghchi/Shamkhani/Pezeshkian/Akraminia/IRGC/Pakistan-Naqvi) — calibrate, do not maximalist-escalate, while diplomatic tracks run.
sources: Times of Israel May 17 liveblog (IDF statement on Hezbollah drones + rockets, no injuries) — primary IDF + Israeli independent
Al Jazeera May 16 'Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ceasefire extension'
recent_signals.verification: Hezbollah drone/rocket fire at IDF May 17 = CONFIRMED ACTION (IDF primary, ToI liveblog); NO INJURIES = CONFIRMED (IDF explicit statement); Litani-KIA window Day 4 of 14 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE (no second IDF KIA reported).

recent_signals.headline: **A4 LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED ON DAY 2 OF 14: Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, 20, Golani Brigade 12th Battalion killed by HEZBOLLAH MORTAR FIRE near the Litani river May 14** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel primary, JNS, i24News, Haaretz, Israeli MoD primary). Total IDF war toll 937. Hezbollah launched 24 attacks on IDF positions, soldiers and military vehicles in southern Lebanon over a 24-hour window per Al Jazeera; Dagan KIA is one consequence of that escalation. **The kinetic mechanism — mortar fire — is distinct from prior drone-attrition pattern; this is transition to the ground-engagement casualty regime the trigger was designed to detect.** Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling continues to hold; the action targeted uniformed IDF soldier in IDF-disclosed weeklong raid territory. **State Department 'productive and positive' on Washington talks Day 2; ceasefire-extension expected; ceasefire actually expires Sunday May 17 (NOT May 15 as yesterday's brief recorded — date correction)**. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem's 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks line still operative but irrelevant to Karam-Dermer bilateral. The Hezbollah action sequence is now operationally synchronised with Iran's Akraminia 'surprising options' rhetoric on the same day — but Hezbollah's response remains within calibrated mortar/drone attrition pattern, not full-spectrum kinetic re-engagement.
sources: Times of Israel May 15 (Dagan KIA primary)
recent_signals.verification: Dagan KIA via mortar fire = CONFIRMED ACTION (Times of Israel primary + JNS + i24News + Haaretz + IDF/MoD primary); KIA trigger fired Day 2 of 14 = CONFIRMED (action crossed threshold); Hezbollah 24 attacks in 24h = CONFIRMED (Al Jazeera); Washington talks Day 2 'productive and positive' = CONFIRMED (State Department primary via Haaretz); ceasefire-expiry May 17 = CONFIRMED (NPR + Manila Times + Al Jazeera); civilian-inside-Israel ceiling continues = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: **A7 IDF ANNOUNCED MAY 13 'WEEKLONG RAID' BEYOND LITANI led by Golani Brigade's Reconnaissance Unit — meaningful UPGRADE from yesterday's 'first publicly-acknowledged Litani crossing': IDF itself now framing operation as sustained week-long campaign** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel May 13 liveblog primary + JNS + Haaretz). 'Some 15 Hezbollah operatives' killed past 24h; 'some 45 Hezbollah targets' total over 24h including command centres, surveillance posts, weapon depots. Hezbollah fired explosive drones at Israel May 13 (Haaretz May 13 liveblog) — drones triggered Iron Dome interceptor over southern Lebanon, IDF later said false alarm. Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon (Jibsheet, Kfar Dounine, Nabatieh); 2 Israeli soldiers wounded (CNN). **NO new Israeli soldier KIA past 24h — new 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger at Day 2 of 14 HAS NOT activated**. **STATE DEPARTMENT CONFIRMED PRIMARY: third round US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington May 14-15, agenda includes 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah' + 'full restoration of Lebanese state authority'** — direct institutional pressure on Hezbollah structural status. April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires May 15 as talks finish — choreographed. Hezbollah's Naim Qassem 'categorically rejects' direct talks line operative but irrelevant to Karam-Dermer bilateral track.
sources: Times of Israel 'IDF says it carried out weeklong raid on Hezbollah sites beyond Lebanon's Litani River' May 13
JNS 'WATCH: IDF tank strike kills Hezbollah terrorist in Lebanon'
US State Department primary 'Next Meeting Between the Governments of the United States, Lebanon, and Israel'
CFR 'Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended for Three Weeks'
CNN Day 75 liveblog (13 killed Lebanon, 2 IDF wounded)
recent_signals.verification: IDF weeklong Litani raid framing = CONFIRMED ACTION (IDF own framing primary); Washington Israel-Lebanon talks May 14-15 = CONFIRMED (State Department primary); Lebanese casualty figures = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry via CNN); 2 IDF wounded = CONFIRMED (CNN); Litani-KIA trigger NOT activated = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: A7 IDF GROUND TROOPS CROSSED LITANI RIVER MAY 12 NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH (~10 km from border) = FIRST PUBLICLY-ACKNOWLEDGED ISRAELI GROUND CROSSING OF LITANI SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE; operation targeted Hezbollah military structures in overnight strikes; explosive drones at IDF troops landed in open areas (no casualty). IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' = most senior IDF officer publicly declaring ceasefire dead. Hezbollah continues precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan (Press TV / Iranian state attribution). Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed prior 24h; cumulative toll 2,704 / 8,311 wounded. NO new Israeli soldier KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 since ceasefire. Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling STILL HELD through May 13 — Day 1 of extended 14-day window after Glovanyov; no civilian casualty inside Israel proper. CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated; Day 2 of 7-day Israeli-corroboration window. **Litani ground crossing materially raises both casualty + miscalculation risk going forward — Hezbollah faces direct ground confrontation for first time since April 16 ceasefire. New trigger added: Litani-ground-crossing-induced Israeli soldier KIA within 14 days (by 2026-05-26).**
sources: Times of Israel liveblog May 12 (Litani crossing) — primary
Press TV (via Global Security Org) Hezbollah strikes — Iranian state
recent_signals.verification: Litani ground crossing May 12 = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel liveblog primary); Zamir 'no cease-fire' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (IDF Chief on record); Hezbollah attribution to strikes at named IDF gatherings = REPORTED (Press TV / Iranian state); civilian-trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS Day 1 of extended 14-day window; SAM May 12 = REPORTED CGTN single-source (Day 2 of 7-day Israeli-corroboration window).

recent_signals.headline: HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONE STRIKE NEAR MANARA (just inside Israel) MAY 10 ~16:00 KILLED IDF RESERVIST WO ALEXANDER GLOVANYOV (47, 6924th Transport Battalion, Petah Tikva); announced May 11 = 5TH IDF SOLDIER KILLED post-April 16 ceasefire, all by 'cheap, hard-to-detect' FPV/explosive drones. Glovanyov is SOLDIER not CIVILIAN — May 10 civilian-trigger window EXPIRED UNTRIPPED on May 10 HOLDS through May 12 with no civilian casualty. Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling has HELD across full window. IDF struck 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 (evacuation warnings 9 villages); Zebdine drone strike killed 2 civilians distributing bread; Abba airstrike killed 2/wounded 5; FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,869. May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3), Haris (1, 7th cumulative), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded. NEW MAY 12: SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft; IDF launched interceptor; Mediterranean coast alerts (CGTN single-source — needs Israeli-side corroboration). Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11 at Khiam/Deir Seryan/Tayr Harfa/Bayyada/Rashaf/Naqoura (Hezbollah-side CLAIMED). Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes May 11: war 'not over' until proxies neutralized — Haaretz only outlet treating Hezbollah linkage as deliberate war-extension. Knesset extended reservist authority to May 31; IDF Chief Zamir said military needs 12,000 additional recruits.
sources: Times of Israel + Ynet + Haaretz + JPost + JNS + Xinhua + Middle East Eye + VINnews (Glovanyov KIA, 7+ confirmations)
Al Jazeera + Lebanese NNA + Wikipedia 2026 Lebanon war timeline + Detroit News + Democracy Now (IDF strikes)

recent_signals.headline: DAY 14/14 OF TRIGGER WINDOW — IDF STRUCK 85+ HEZBOLLAH TARGETS IN SOUTHERN LEBANON IN PRIOR 24 HOURS (INCL. UNDERGROUND WEAPONS SITE IN BEQAA VALLEY, AFTER EVACUATION WARNINGS FOR 9 VILLAGES); 12 KILLED INCLUDING 7 IN SAKSAKIYEH SINGLE STRIKE (A GIRL AMONG THE DEAD); HEZBOLLAH RETALIATED VIA DRONE STRIKE NEAR MISGAV AM — IDF CONFIRMED 3 RESERVISTS WOUNDED BY HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONES (FIRST HEZBOLLAH-INFLICTED IDF CASUALTIES OF TRIGGER WINDOW BUT MILITARY TARGETS ONLY); MAY 8 MT. MERON DRONE IMPACT CORRECTED — IN TERRITORY ADJACENT TO LEBANON BORDER, NOT MERON AREA ITSELF; 2 SOLDIERS WOUNDED (ONE SERIOUSLY) BY DRONE IN ADJACENT TERRITORY. Trigger window expires today with trigger UNTRIPPED. Asymmetry continues: Lebanese casualties cumulating, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks. Coordination-decay framework holds at Day 14/14.

recent_signals.headline: HEZBOLLAH FIRST CROSS-BORDER DRONE REACH OF CYCLE — 'SWARM OF DRONES' TARGETED MT. MERON IDF AIR-TRAFFIC-CONTROL BASE INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER (MILITARY TARGET, NO ISRAELI CASUALTIES); TRIGGER 'ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER WITHIN 14 DAYS' STILL UNTRIPPED DAY 13/14. Hezbollah claimed retaliation for Israel's May 6 Beirut strike (Ballout + 2 senior commanders) and ongoing IDF strikes in southern Lebanon. PBS reported rockets 'hit open areas in Israel' no casualties. IDF airstrikes Friday killed 5-10 in southern Lebanon (paramedic, 2 children, 3 women per Lebanon health ministry; Toura, Kfar Chouba, others). Saturday May 9: IDF airstrike on car near Bafliyeh killed 4 Hezbollah members. Mt. Meron is IDF's primary northern air-traffic-control facility ~8 km from Lebanon border. Capability demonstrated, military-target ceiling intact. Coordination-decay framework holds at Day 13/14, Day 14 ~May 10 = last day of originally-flagged window.

historical_summaries.summary: 5 signals. Hezbollah launched strikes on Israel in response to Khamenei's killing | Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon in response | Nearly 1,000 dead in Lebanon from 2 weeks of fighting

29 signals. Israel killed Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem — commander of Hezbollah's southern front — in Beirut airstrike on April 1 | Israel struck Lebanon April 1, coinciding with Trump's primetime address | CLAIMED (Hezbollah): Fired cruise missile at Israeli warship at midnight April 6, 68 nautical miles off Lebanese coast
